subject: To my dear friend...
body:
I can't believe that this is really happening....

Thinking about it all...... 
I have wrote some thoughts for U. Maybe they will be helpful dear Jeffrey!


*ONLY YOU can decide how U feel about things/experiences!!! 
It is up to U how U experience what surrounds U! 
Everything what happens to U is in your mind....nothing is real. 
Nothing is real, unless U make it!!!
Your mind is the best tool U have! And your one is incredible!
Understanding erases the need for forgiveness!  
Like Nelson Mandela beeing 27years in prison! When he went out, he didn't have to forgive,because he understood the action of others. That they did the best in the conditions they were at.

THE WAY U WILL EXPERIENCE IT ...IS THE WAY U WILL THINK ABOUT IT!

*"Perspective creates perception, that creates believe that creates behavers and that creates experiences and that your reality and that your next perspective!"

The fastest way to change reality is to change your perspective! Look at things from different angle!

*Low of opposits-when we want something...we create the opposite too.

U wanting purity now have attracted the opposite so U can express your self, your purity.

"Only in presents of darkness U can see the light!"

Some people say...
The faster way to attract what U want. More master way, but harder way, is to call for the opposite! 
Call for the darkness so U experience light!!!!

*Each problem has in it huge opportunity.....!!!
Things R not problems...just conditions!

I don't know if it will make any sense all this to U my dear friend!

My sister said to me once before I went to have difficult conversation.
 
"Enjoy the difficult moments!" 

......and during the difficult moments I remember it and I could see it all differently...It got easier. 
Because knowing that I'm in pain....I knew that I can feel and that I'm alive!

Just know that this will be an incredible journey, if U make it that way!

And know that I'm thinking of U dear Jeffrey!!! 
:-)

Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
